# PrimitiveKit

> A flexible, accessible React component library with 600+ design tokens. Zero hardcoded values. Complete customization.


## Blog

## Documentation
- [Installation](https://primitivekit.com/docs/installation/): Get started with PrimitiveKit by installing it via your preferred package manager.

- [Quick Start](https://primitivekit.com/docs/quick-start/): Quick StartGet up and running with PrimitiveKit in minutes.

### React Components
